summary: Backend code review and unit testing completed for color_variant bug fix. All 8 runnable tests passed (4 skipped due to empty DB). The fix correctly propagates color_variant from records to feed posts.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ build_post_response (hive.py:276-285): Correctly extracts record_color_variant from record and creates resolved_color_variant = post.get('color_variant') or record_color_variant
✅ PostResponse construction (hive.py:326): Uses color_variant=resolved_color_variant instead of raw post.get('color_variant')
✅ composer_now_spinning (hive.py:420): Stores color_variant on post_doc from record.get('color_variant') or record.get('pressing_notes')
✅ add_record (collection.py:70): ADDED_TO_COLLECTION post now stores color_variant: record_data.color_variant
✅ PostResponse model (models.py:183): Has color_variant: Optional[str] = None field

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 passed, 4 skipped due to empty DB)

test_credentials: N/A - DB empty in preview environment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for color_variant propagation verified via code review and unit tests. The fix has three parts: (1) build_post_response now creates resolved_color_variant from post.color_variant or record.color_variant, (2) composer_now_spinning stores color_variant on the post document from the record, (3) add_record in collection.py stores color_variant on ADDED_TO_COLLECTION posts. Frontend PostCards.js correctly prioritizes post.color_variant over record.color_variant. All code paths verified.

root_cause_1.description: build_post_response did not propagate color_variant from record to PostResponse
root_cause_1.fix_details: Created record_color_variant variable and resolved_color_variant = post.get('color_variant') or record_color_variant

root_cause_2.description: composer_now_spinning didn't store color_variant on post document
root_cause_2.fix_details: Added 'color_variant': record.get('color_variant') or record.get('pressing_notes') to post_doc

root_cause_3.description: add_record didn't store color_variant on ADDED_TO_COLLECTION post

frontend_verification.NowSpinningCard: Line 172-173: const variantText = post.color_variant || record.color_variant || post.pressing_variant || record.pressing_notes
frontend_verification.AddedToCollectionCard: Line 277: const variantText = post.color_variant || record.color_variant || record.pressing_notes
